channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran says no final deal yet, despite Trump's claim of agreement to end war
item.description: Iran stated Friday it has not reached a final conclusion on a war-ending deal, despite President Trump announcing an agreement.

item.title: Video captures massive explosions destroying multiple homes in Pennsylvania
item.description: Blasts in Clinton Township leveled at least two homes and injured three people, including an 84-year-old woman, officials said.

item.title: One killed in Iowa as severe storms and suspected tornadoes hit Midwest
item.description: Severe storms late Thursday knocked out power to hundreds of thousands, damaged buildings, and canceled flights across the Midwest.

item.title: Europol warns children are being recruited as criminals on an 'industrial scale'
item.description: Children are being recruited as criminals at an 'industrial scale,' posing the single greatest threat to Europe and the world, according to Europol.
